inputPort.markdownDescription:
TCP port to listen on for OTLP/gRPC events from the OpenTelemetry Collector

TCP port where Log10x listens for OTLP/gRPC log records from the OpenTelemetry Collector's `otlp` exporter. Match this against the `endpoint` of your Collector exporter. (Default: 4317)

messageField.markdownDescription:
Dotted JSON path to the field carrying the log line text

Top-level JSON field name on the input record that carries the actual log line text. The default (`body`) matches the flattened shape the input emits for plain-text OTLP bodies. Set to a different field name if your Collector pipeline copies the log line into a different attribute before exporting (e.g. an `<attr_key>` set via a transform). (Default: body)

host.markdownDescription:
TCP host of the OpenTelemetry Collector's OTLP/gRPC receiver

Hostname or IP where the OpenTelemetry Collector's `otlp` receiver is listening for processed events from Log10x. Pairs with `otelCollectorOutputPort`. (Default: 127.0.0.1)

port.markdownDescription:
TCP port of the OpenTelemetry Collector's OTLP/gRPC receiver

TCP port where the OpenTelemetry Collector's `otlp` receiver is listening for processed events from Log10x. MUST differ from the port Log10x's own OTLP/gRPC input listens on (default `4317`) or the two would collide on the same listener. (Default: 24225)

encodeType.markdownDescription:
Output format when outputFields are set. Possible values: [json, delimited]

Specifies how the combined output (main event field plus outputFields) is encoded when writing back to the OpenTelemetry Collector. Possible values: - **json**: formats all fields as a JSON object - **delimited**: formats field values separated by the output delimiter Only takes effect when otelCollectorOutputFields is set. (Default: delimited)
